mapper.select: select id, parent_id, region_code, region_name, region_level, sort_no from sys_region order by region_level, sort_no, id
select id, parent_id, region_code, region_name, region_level, sort_no from sys_region where id = #{id} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into sys_region (parent_id, region_code, region_name, region_level, sort_no) values (#{parentId}, #{regionCode}, #{regionName}, #{regionLevel}, #{sortNo})
mapper.select: select id, parent_id, region_code, region_name, region_level, sort_no from sys_region where region_code = #{regionCode} limit 1
select id, parent_id, region_code, region_name, region_level, sort_no from sys_region where region_level = #{regionLevel} order by sort_no, id
